mapper.sql: id, book_name, author, publisher, isbn, category_id, price, stock, cover_image, description, status, create_time, update_time
b.status = 1 AND b.status <> -1 AND c.status = 1 AND c.status <> -1

sql.if: AND (b.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.publisher, b.price, b.cover_image, c.category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE

SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.price, b.stock, b.cover_image, b.description, b.category_id, c.category_name, b.status FROM book b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.status <> -1

SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.price, b.stock, b.cover_image, b.category_id, c.category_name, b.status, b.create_time FROM book b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book b WHERE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (book_name, author, publisher, isbn, category_id, price, stock, cover_image, description, status) VALUES (#{bookName}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{coverImage}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET book_name = #{bookName}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, isbn = #{isbn}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET status = -1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND status <> -1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status <> -1
